title: Project Engineer
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • Attend to technical matters at site by developing solutions to problems with the application of engineering concepts, practices and techniques.
  • Planning of work and recourses with particular reference to work program to ensure timely progress.
  • Close coordination with sub-contractors, supervisors, surveyors, laboratory personnel, foremen and to ensure effective teamwork.
  • Provides relevant information and reports to Project Manager regularly.
  • To liaise with consultants on the day to day inspection on site.
  • To sort out discrepancies and other detailing problems in the construction works with the consultants and superiors.
  • Implement any and all relevant policies, procedures and work instructions as so defined in the Company's Quality System and QSHE requirement.
  • Assist project manager to prepare daily/weekly and monthly site reports and submit to the planning department.
  • Assist project manager to prepare all related documents before any commencement of any works at site including: Method statements
  • Material submission in order to get approval from supervising consultants before they can be used at site.
  • Preliminary drawings/shop drawings before the consultant can come out with detailed drawings.
  • Permit to work by internal parties such as Safety, QAQC and Environmental departments.
  • Liaise with Design and Technical Department in order to get drawings for construction.
  • Assist and liaise with Approval Department in order to get all the permits to work by local authorities or third parties.
  • Attend weekly progress meetings and prepare minutes of meetings

Requirements:

  • Degree in Civil/ Structural Engineering
  • At least 2 years working experience in civil engineering/infrastructure projects (LTA Projects)
  • Able to work in night shift

postedCompany.description:
Gamuda Berhad is a public listed company listed on the main board of Bursa Malaysia. Founded in 1976, it has grown from a construction-based enterprise to become Malaysia’s leading infrastructure developer with core competencies in engineering and construction, property development and infrastructure concessions.

 

As a pioneer turnkey contractor with Built-Operate-Transfer (BOT) capability and expertise, the distinct hallmark of Gamuda’s innovation and excellence is evident in numerous projects across Malaysia, South-East Asia, Far East Asia, Indochina and the Middle East.

 

Having built the world’s first dual-purpose tunnel and multi award-winning Stormwater Management and Road Tunnel (SMART) in Malaysia, Gamuda is fast gearing up for its next phase of growth as part of the MMC-Gamuda Joint Venture, which is the appointed Project Delivery Partner and underground works contractor by the Government for the nation’s largest public infrastructure project – the Klang Valley Mass Rapid Transit (KVMRT). 

 

Besides the MRT, some of Gamuda’s signature projects include the Kaohsiung Metropolitan Mass Rapid Transit System (KMRT) in Taiwan, the New Doha International Airport (NDIA) and Dukhan Highway in Qatar, as well as the Electrified Double Track Project (Ipoh to Padang Besar), the Damansara-Puchong Highway (LDP) and SPRINT Expressway in Malaysia.

 

JOIN THE TEAM THAT BUILDS ICONIC PROJECTS.

 

Playing a major role in Malaysia’s biggest infrastructure project, the KVMRT, we are on an aggressive talent development endeavour that will provide you a chance to work with top-notch experts in the industry and gain international exposure in the process.
postedCompany.name: GAMUDA BERHAD Singapore Branch
